Navbar.features_tagline: Research in Python. Execute in Rust. Observe in Go.
Navbar.rust_desc: Keep signal, risk, and execution paths fast and bounded.
Navbar.python_desc: Move from backtest ideas to runtime contracts without copy drift.
Navbar.go_desc: Surface health, metrics, and dashboard events on a clean control plane.

Hero.title: Ship Apps & Websites at lightning speed
Hero.subtitle: Deploy cross-platform Mini Apps, micro-frontends, and production websites in seconds. Powered by a blazing-fast Rust trading engine under the hood.

Benefits.description: From mini app distribution to algorithmic trading, our platform accelerates every stage of your digital product lifecycle.
Benefits.benefit_1_desc: Push your mini apps, micro-frontends, and websites live in seconds with zero-config CI/CD pipelines.
Benefits.benefit_2_desc: Deliver assets from 200+ edge locations worldwide with sub-50ms response times and automatic SSL.
Benefits.benefit_3_desc: Access a production-grade algorithmic trading engine built in Rust, directly from your platform dashboard.
Benefits.benefit_4_desc: Monitor deployments, traffic, and trading performance from a single real-time dashboard with AI insights.

Contact.description: Have questions about our platform? Want a custom enterprise plan? We'd love to hear from you.
Contact.subject: Subject

FAQ.q1: What types of apps can I deploy?
FAQ.a1: You can deploy custom mini apps, micro-frontends, Next.js and Vite websites, and static sites. Our platform handles builds, CDN distribution, and SSL automatically.
FAQ.q2: How does the trading engine integrate with my apps?
FAQ.a2: The trading engine runs as a separate Rust-powered service accessible via REST and WebSocket APIs. You can embed trading widgets in your mini apps or use it standalone from the dashboard.
FAQ.a3: Yes! Our Starter plan includes 3 mini apps and 5 websites at no cost. Upgrade to Pro or Enterprise for unlimited deployments and live trading access.
FAQ.a4: Most deployments complete in under 30 seconds. Our Edge CDN ensures your apps load in sub-50ms from 200+ global locations.
FAQ.q5: Is the trading engine safe for production?
FAQ.a5: Absolutely. The engine includes built-in risk management, circuit breakers, exposure limits, and paper trading mode for strategy validation before going live.

Features.main_title: Everything You Need, In One Platform
Features.description: Build, deploy, and scale mini apps, websites, and trading strategies — all powered by a unified cloud infrastructure.
Features.f1_desc: Build and distribute mini apps directly to mobile devices and web browsers with our native SDK support.
Features.f2_desc: Deploy Next.js, Vite, and static sites with automatic HTTPS, preview deployments, and custom domains.
Features.f3_desc: Execute algorithmic trading strategies with microsecond-level latency and built-in risk management.
Features.f4_desc: Monitor deployments, app performance, user analytics, and trading P&L in a single unified interface.
Features.f5_desc: RESTful and WebSocket APIs for programmatic control over deployments, trading, and data pipelines.
Features.f6_desc: SOC 2 compliance, role-based access control, and end-to-end encryption for all platform operations.

Pricing.description: Start free and scale as you grow. No hidden fees.
Pricing.starter_desc: Perfect for individuals and small projects getting started.
Pricing.pro_desc: For growing teams that need more power and flexibility.
Pricing.enterprise_desc: For organizations with advanced requirements and scale.

Services.description: From app distribution to financial trading, explore the full range of platform services.
Services.s1_desc: Publish and manage custom mini apps and micro-frontends through our integrated marketplace.
Services.s2_desc: Automatic deployments from Git with preview URLs, rollback, and custom domains.
Services.s3_desc: Visual strategy editor with backtesting, paper trading, and live execution.
Services.s4_desc: AI-powered analytics across all platform products with real-time alerts.

Testimonials.comment_minh: RustAT cut our mini app deployment time from hours to minutes. The integrated trading engine is a game-changer for our fintech products.
Testimonials.comment_sarah: We migrated from Vercel and saved 40% on hosting costs. The edge network performance is outstanding.
Testimonials.comment_james: The Rust-based trading engine handles 50,000 orders per second with sub-millisecond latency. Nothing else comes close.
Testimonials.comment_linh: Deploying custom mini apps used to be painful. RustAT made it as simple as a git push.
Testimonials.comment_david: The unified dashboard for hosting, mini apps, and trading is exactly what our team needed. Zero context switching.
Testimonials.comment_maria: From prototype to production trading in 2 weeks. The backtesting tools and risk management are enterprise-grade.

Footer.rights: All rights reserved. Built with Next.js, shadcn/ui, TypeScript, and Tailwind.
